name: Insertion sort
complexity_note: O(n^2) worst case, O(1) auxiliary space
responsible_use_note: correct sorting does not validate downstream ranking criteria

name: Binary search
invariant_note: target, if present, remains inside search interval
responsible_use_note: requires sorted input and clear equality semantics

name: Breadth-first search
invariant_note: queue processes vertices by nondecreasing distance
responsible_use_note: edge meaning determines interpretation of reachability

name: Merge sort
invariant_note: merged list preserves sorted order and all elements
correctness_note: prove by induction over list length
responsible_use_note: efficient ordering does not justify what is being ordered

name: Dijkstra shortest path
input_domain: weighted graph with nonnegative weights and source
invariant_note: settled vertices have final shortest distances
complexity_note: implementation dependent; often O((V+E) log V)
correctness_note: prove using nonnegative weights and greedy invariant
responsible_use_note: weight semantics determine what shortest means

name: Dynamic programming knapsack
invariant_note: table entry represents best value for prefix and capacity
correctness_note: prove by induction over table states
responsible_use_note: objective function may omit fairness, risk, or public consequences
